content.text:
PWAGENT_CI1_START
NO_CI_SCRIPT
PWAGENT_CI1_EXIT=127
PWAGENT_CI1_END
PWAGENT_MANIFEST_START
NO_MANIFEST
PWAGENT_MANIFEST_END
PWAGENT_SCAN_START

PWAGENT_SCAN_END
PWAGENT_TASKS_MD_START
NO_TASKS_MD
PWAGENT_TASKS_MD_END
PWAGENT_TASKS_REMAIN=0

observation.command: echo "PWAGENT_CI1_START"; if [ -f /workspace/Daycare2/scripts/ci.sh ]; then chmod +x /workspace/Daycare2/scripts/ci.sh 2>/dev/null; cd /workspace/Daycare2 && ./scripts/ci.sh 2>&1 | tail -n 30; ec1=${PIPESTATUS[0]}; else echo "NO_CI_SCRIPT"; ec1=127; fi; echo "PWAGENT_CI1_EXIT=$ec1"; echo "PWAGENT_CI1_END"; echo "PWAGENT_MANIFEST_START"; if [ -f /workspace/Daycare2/package.json ]; then head -n 40 /workspace/Daycare2/package.json; elif [ -f /workspace/Daycare2/requirements.txt ]; then head -n 40 /workspace/Daycare2/requirements.txt; else echo "NO_MANIFEST"; fi; echo "PWAGENT_MANIFEST_END"; echo "PWAGENT_SCAN_START"; _PWFILES=$(find /workspace/Daycare2/ -maxdepth 4 -type f 2>/dev/null | grep -v node_modules | grep -v .git | grep -v "\.orig" | grep -v "\.rej"); echo "$_PWFILES" | head -n 200; TOTAL_FILES=$(echo "$_PWFILES" | wc -l); if [ "$TOTAL_FILES" -gt 200 ]; then echo "(truncated: $TOTAL_FILES files total, showing 200)"; fi; echo "PWAGENT_SCAN_END"; echo "PWAGENT_TASKS_MD_START"; if [ -f /workspace/Daycare2/docs/TASKS.md ]; then cat /workspace/Daycare2/docs/TASKS.md; else echo "NO_TASKS_MD"; fi; echo "PWAGENT_TASKS_MD_END"; if [ -f /workspace/Daycare2/docs/TASKS.md ]; then if grep -q "\[ \]" /workspace/Daycare2/docs/TASKS.md; then echo "PWAGENT_TASKS_REMAIN=1"; else echo "PWAGENT_TASKS_REMAIN=0"; fi; else echo "PWAGENT_TASKS_REMAIN=0"; fi
